payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped close-up of a rectangular beige pillow with horizontal light-beige to tan stripes, woven fabric texture and visible seam lines; pillow appears soft and slightly compressed and is likely photographed at about 0.6 m distance.
